name: Ryan Adams

acts.description: Sent explicit sexual texts to a 14-year-old fan; NYT investigation documented emotional manipulation and abuse of multiple women
Pattern of psychological manipulation and emotional abuse of ex-wife and other women

behavior_summary: 2019 NYT investigation documented sexting with a 14-year-old fan, emotional manipulation of multiple women in the music industry, and a pattern of using professional favors as coercive currency.

art.summary: Critically acclaimed alt-country and rock songwriter with a devoted following and an enormous catalog.

verdict.blurb: Critically adored singer-songwriter who used his position to emotionally abuse women and send explicit messages to a 14-year-old fan. Heartbreaker the album is a classic. Heartbreaker the biography is considerably less poetic.
